esmModuleSystemV1.description: ESM模块系统规则定义 - 约束驱动自动化管理

rule001_importExportOnly.title: 强制使用ES Module语法
rule001_importExportOnly.description: 禁止使用CommonJS语法，必须使用import/export

example.correct:
import { readFile } from 'node:fs/promises';
export function createServer() { ... }

rule001_importExportOnly.rationale: 确保代码使用现代ESM规范，提升构建性能

rule002_explicitExtensions.title: 显式文件扩展名
rule002_explicitExtensions.description: 导入本地模块时必须显式包含文件扩展名

example.correct:
import config from './config.json';
import { handler } from './handler.ts';
example.incorrect:
import config from './config';
import { handler } from './handler';

rule002_explicitExtensions.exception: Node.js内置模块和npm包可省略扩展名

rule003_unifiedPathSeparator.title: 统一导入路径分隔符
rule003_unifiedPathSeparator.description: 导入路径统一使用正斜杠 /，禁止使用反斜杠
rule003_unifiedPathSeparator.rationale: 确保跨平台兼容性，Windows用户特别注意

rule004_typesOnlyImport.title: 类型导入隔离
rule004_typesOnlyImport.description: 仅导入类型时使用import type语法

example.correct:
import type { Config } from './types';
import { Logger } from './logger';
example.incorrect: import { Config } from './types'; // 当仅用作类型时

benefits: 禁止类型在运行时引入，减少Bundle大小

rule005_namedExportsPriority.title: 命名导出优先
rule005_namedExportsPriority.description: 优先使用命名导出，避免默认导出除非单值模块

example.correct:
export interface Config { ... }
export function create() { ... }
example.caution: export default class McpGateway { ... } // 仅单一值时

rule005_namedExportsPriority.rationale: 命名导出更易重构和Tree-shaking，IDE自动完成支持更好

rule006_dynamicImport.title: 动态导入时机
rule006_dynamicImport.description: 大型模块或按需加载时使用动态import()

example.note: 仅在必要时使用，配合代码分割效果最佳

rule007_pathAlias.title: 路径别名规范
rule007_pathAlias.description: 使用路径别名时保持命名一致性和可读性

rule008_testFileConventions.title: 测试文件ESM规范
rule008_testFileConventions.description: 测试文件中遵循以下ESM规范

example.correct:
import type { McpGateway } from '@/gateway/index.ts';
import { describe, test } from '@jest/globals';

tddIntegration.redPhase: 编写测试时使用ESM原生import语句
tddIntegration.refactorPhase: 优化时通过import type分离类型定义
